التقريب‎ بوجه‎ (وجه‎ على‎) approximately, roughly, nearly;خاص‎ بوجه‎ or خاص‎ وجه‎ على‎ (ḵāṣṣ) especially, in particular; عام‎ (وجه‎ على‎)بوجه‎ (‘āmm) generally, in general;ما‎ بوجه‎ some way or other, somehow; in a certain way, to a certain extent; حق‎ وجه‎ بدون‎ (w. ḥaqqin) without any legitimate claim, without being in the least entitled, in an entirely unlawful manner;وجه‎ على‎ in the manner of, in the form of, in the shape of; with regard to, concerning. about; وجھه‎ على‎ in his own way; in the right manner, correctly, properly, as it should be; وجھه‎ على غير ‎improperly, incorrectly, wrongly; وجھه‎ على‎ ذھب‎ and وجھه‎ على‎ مضى‎ to go one’s own way, go one’s way; الوجه‎ ھذا‎ على‎ in this manner, this way, thus; الإجمال‎ وجه‎ على‎ (w. al-ijmāl) on the whole, by and large, in general; altogether, in the aggregate;التالي‎ الوجه‎ على‎ in the following manner, as follows; التفصيل‎ وجه‎ على‎ at great length, in detail, elaborately; الحصر‎ وجه‎ على‎ (w. il- haṣr) in a condensed form, briefly stated, in a nutshell; العموم‎ وجه‎ على‎ in general, generally; اليقين‎ وجه‎ على‎ with certainty; في‎ وجھه‎ before him, in his presence; counter to him; before his (very) eyes; الله‎ لوجه‎ for the sake of God, regardless of any reward in this life; for nothing, gratis; وجه‎ كل‎ من‎ in every respect, from every point of view, on all grounds; كثيرة‎ وجوه‎ من‎ from many points of view, in many respects; الوجوه‎ بعض‎ من‎ in some ways; الوجوه‎ كل‎ من‎ in every respect, in every way, all the way through, completely; وجھه‎ ابيض‎ ibyaḍḍa wajhuhū to enjoy an excellent reputation, stand in good repute; وجھه‎ اسود‎ iswadda wajhuhū to fall into discredit. be discredited, be in disgrace; وجھا‎ أخذ‎ to win respect, gain prestige; العروسة‎ وجه‎ أخذ‎ (wajha l-‘arūsa) to consummate marriage; وجھه‎ في‎ إھانه‎ to insult s. o. to his face; وجھه‎ بيض‎ bayyaḍḍa wajhahū to make s. o. appear blameless, in a favorable light, to whitewash, exculpate, vindicate, justify s. o., play s. o. up, make much of s. o.; to honor s. o., show honor to s. o.; الطريق‎ وجه‎ له‎ خال‎ (ḵalā,wajhu ṭ-ṭ.) his way was unobstructed, he had clear sailing;وجھه‎ سفه‎ saffaha wajhahū or وجھه‎ سود‎ (sawwada) to expose s. o., show s. o. up, make a fool of s. o., bring s. o. into discredit, disgrace s. o., dishonor s. o.; الحقيقة‎ وجه‎ شوه‎ šawwaha wajh l-h. to distort the truth;الوظيفة‎ وجه‎ شوه‎ to disgrace one’s profession or office; وعينه‎ الأمر‎ وجه‎ ضرب‎ (wajha l-amr wa-‘ainahū) to touch on the very essence of a matter, hit the mark; فلان‎ وجه‎ في‎ قام‎ to stand up to s. o., take a stand against s. o.; فلان‎ وجه‎ من‎ ھرب‎ to flee from s. o.; Nominal phrases: البحري‎ الوجه‎ (baḥrī) Lower Egypt;القلي‎ الوجه‎ (qiblī) Upper Egypt;الحال‎ وجه‎ the circumstances, the state of affairs, the factual situation; الشبه‎ وجه‎ w. aš-šibh point of resemblance;النھار‎ وجه‎ wajah n-nahār during the daytime;وجھين‎ ذو‎ كلام‎ (kalām) equivocal statement, ambiguous words; القمر‎ أوجه‎ a. al-qamar the lunar phases;الناس‎ وجوه‎ prominent people, Leading personalities; with regard to, concerning. about; وجھه‎ على‎ in his own way; in the right manner, correctly, properly, as it should be; وجھه‎ على غير ‎improperly, incorrectly, wrongly; وجھه‎ على‎ ذھب‎ and وجھه‎ على‎ مضى‎ to go one’s own way, go one’s way; التفصيل‎ وجه‎ على‎ at great length, in detail, elaborately; الحصر‎ وجه‎ على‎ (w. il- haṣr) in a condensed form, briefly stated, in a nutshell; العموم‎ وجه‎ على‎ in general, generally; اليقين‎ وجه‎ على‎ with certainty; في‎ وجھه‎ before him, in his presence; counter to him; before his (very) eyes; الله‎ لوجه‎ for the sake of God, regardless of any reward in this life; for nothing, gratis; وجه‎ كل‎ من‎ in every respect, from every point of view, on all grounds; كثيرة‎ وجوه‎ من‎ from many points of view, in many respects; الوجوه‎ بعض‎ من‎ in some ways; الوجوه‎ كل‎ من‎ in every respect, in every way, all the way through, completely; وجھه‎ ابيض‎ ibyaḍḍa wajhuhū to enjoy an excellent reputation, stand in good repute; وجھه‎ اسود‎ iswadda wajhuhū to fall into discredit. be discredited, be in disgrace; وجھا‎ أخذ‎ to win respect, gain prestige; العروسة‎ وجه‎ أخذ‎ (wajha l-‘arūsa) to consummate marriage; وجھه‎ في‎ إھانه‎ to insult s. o. to his face; وجھه‎ بيض‎ bayyaḍḍa wajhahū to make s. o. appear blameless, in a favorable light, to whitewash, exculpate, vindicate, justify s. o., play s. o. up, make much of s. o.; to honor s. o., show honor to s. o.; فلان‎ وجه‎ في‎ قام‎ to stand up to s. o., take a stand against s. o.; فلان‎ وجه‎ من‎ ھرب‎ to flee from s. o.; Nominal phrases: البحري‎ الوجه‎ (baḥrī) Lower Egypt;القلي‎ الوجه‎ (qiblī) Upper Egypt;الحال‎ وجه‎ the circumstances, the state of affairs, the factual situation; (وقوع‎ wuqū‘) to fall; to fall down, drop; to tumble; to come to pass, take place, occur; to happen (ل‎ to s. o.), befall (ل‎ s. o.); to get (في‎ in a situation, also, e. g., in a fix); to get (إلى‎ to), arrive (إلى‎ at); to come, run (على‎ across), meet (على‎ with); to fall (على‎ to s. o., to s. o.’s lot or share); to slight, settle down (على‎ on: bird); to have sexual intercourse (على‎ with a woman); to be divided (في‎ into), consist (في‎ of); to be located, be situated, lie (geog.,); (وقيعة‎ waqī‘a) to slander, backbite, defame, disparage (من‎ or ب‎ s. o.); (waq‘) to rush, pounce, fall (ب‎ upon s. o.) ; بعضھم‎ في‎ وقعوا‎ they fell to quarreling, they fell out with one another; بايديھم‎ وقع‎ (bi-aidīhim) he fell into their hands;حواسه‎ تحت‎ وقع‎ (ḥawāssihī)to enter s. o.’s range of perception, become palpable, tangible for s. o.; حبه‎ في‎ وقعت‎ (ḥubbihī) she fell in love with him; حرب‎ وقعت‎ (ḥarb) war broke out; الحق‎ وقع‎ (ḥaqq) the law has been determined; عليه‎ الحق‎ وقع‎ he was found guilty; الفخ‎ في‎ وقع‎ (faḵḵ) to walk into the trap, get caught in the snare; فريسته‎ وقع‎ (farīsatahū) to fall victim to s. o., become a prey of s. o.; مكان‎ في‎ قلبه‎ من‎ وقع‎ (min qalbihī fī makānin) to take s. th. to heart; to make s. th. one’s business, attend to s. th.; عليه‎ القول‎ وقع‎ (qaul) he was called upon to speak, he was given the floor; ان‎ نفسه‎ في‎ وقع‎ it came to his mind, it occurred to him to ...; في‎ الكلام‎ وقع‎ (kalām) the words impressed him, went to his heart, touched him;نفسه‎ (من‎)في‎ وقعت‎ she has made an impression on him, she has bewitched him; ھواھا‎ في‎ وقع‎ (hawāhā) he fell in love with her; موقعه‎ وقع‎ (mauqi‘ahū) to stand in place of, stand for;موقعه‎ غير‎ في‎ وقع‎ (fī gairi mauqi‘ihī) to be misplaced, stand in the wrong place, be used in the wrong context (word); موقعا‎ منه‎ الكلام‎ وقع‎ (kalāmu, mauqi‘an) the words moved or impressed him;حسنا‎ موقعا‎ منه‎ الأمر‎ وقع‎ (mauqi‘an ḥasanan) the matter pleased him very much, was most welcome to him; الرضا‎ موقع‎ عنده‎ وقع‎ (mauqi‘a r-riḍā) it met his approval; جليلا‎ موقعا‎ النفوس‎ في‎ وقع‎ to leave a strong, splendid impression; الاستغراب‎ موقع‎ وقع‎ to cause raised eyebrows, cause astonishment

(وقوع‎ wuqū‘) to fall; to fall down, drop; to tumble; to come to pass, take place, occur; to happen (ل‎ to s. o.), befall (ل‎ s. o.); to get (في‎ in a situation, also, e. g., in a fix); to get (إلى‎ to), arrive (إلى‎ at); to come, run (على‎ across), meet (على‎ with); to fall (على‎ to s. o., to s. o.’s lot or share); to slight, settle down (على‎ on: bird); to have sexual intercourse (على‎ with a woman); to be divided (في‎ into), consist (في‎ of); to be located, be situated, lie (geog.,); (وقيعة‎ waqī‘a) to slander, backbite, defame, disparage (من‎ or ب‎ s. o.); (waq‘) to rush, pounce, fall (ب‎ upon s. o.) ; بعضھم‎ في‎ وقعوا‎ they fell to quarreling, they fell out with one another; بايديھم‎ وقع‎ (bi-aidīhim) he fell into their hands;حواسه‎ تحت‎ وقع‎ (ḥawāssihī)to enter s. o.’s range of perception, become palpable, tangible for s. o.; حبه‎ في‎ وقعت‎ (ḥubbihī) she fell in love with him; حرب‎ وقعت‎ (ḥarb) war broke out; الحق‎ وقع‎ (ḥaqq) the law has been determined; عليه‎ الحق‎ وقع‎ he was found guilty; الفخ‎ في‎ وقع‎ (faḵḵ) to walk into the trap, get caught in the snare; فريسته‎ وقع‎ (farīsatahū) to fall victim to s. o., become a prey of s. o.; مكان‎ في‎ قلبه‎ من‎ وقع‎ (min qalbihī fī makānin) to take s. th. to heart; to make s. th. one’s business, attend to s. th.; عليه‎ القول‎ وقع‎ (qaul) he was called upon to speak, he was given the floor; ان‎ نفسه‎ في‎ وقع‎ it came to his mind, it occurred to him to ...; في‎ الكلام‎ وقع‎ (kalām) the words impressed him, went to his heart, touched him;نفسه‎ (من‎)في‎ وقعت‎ she has made an impression on him, she has bewitched him; ھواھا‎ في‎ وقع‎ (hawāhā) he fell in love with her; موقعه‎ وقع‎ (mauqi‘ahū) to stand in place of, stand for;موقعه‎ غير‎ في‎ وقع‎ (fī gairi mauqi‘ihī) to be misplaced, stand in the wrong place, be used in the wrong context (word); موقعا‎ منه‎ الكلام‎ وقع‎ (kalāmu, mauqi‘an) the words moved or impressed him;حسنا‎ موقعا‎ منه‎ الأمر‎ وقع‎ (mauqi‘an ḥasanan) the matter pleased him very much, was most welcome to him; الرضا‎ موقع‎ عنده‎ وقع‎ (mauqi‘a r-riḍā) it met his approval; جليلا‎ موقعا‎ النفوس‎ في‎ وقع‎ to leave a strong, splendid impression; الاستغراب‎ موقع‎ وقع‎ to cause raised eyebrows, cause astonishment
